Let me start by exploring the codebase to understand the code and tests.

For net10.0, implicit usings aren't enabled by default unless I explicitly set that in the project file. The code is using `ArgumentOutOfRangeException` without the proper using statement, so I need to enable implicit usings to fix this. data.content: All 11 tests pass. Now let me systematically introduce mutations to find which ones slip through undetected.

arguments.command:
cat > /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712/mutate.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
cd /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712
SRC="PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs"
cp "$SRC" "${SRC}.bak"

survived=0
killed=0
errors=0
results=""

run_mutation() {
  local id="$1" desc="$2" find="$3" replace="$4"
  cp "${SRC}.bak" "$SRC"
  # Apply mutation using perl for exact string match
  perl -pi -e "s/\Q$find\E/$replace/" "$SRC"
  
  output=$(dotnet test PricingEngine.Tests -v q --no-restore 2>&1)
  rc=$?
  
  if echo "$output" | grep -q "Failed:     0"; then
    status="SURVIVED ⚠️"
    ((survived++))
  elif echo "$output" | grep -q "Failed:"; then
    status="KILLED ✅"
    ((killed++))
  else
    status="BUILD ERROR"
    ((errors++))
  fi
  
  results="${results}\n  ${id}. ${desc}\n     Mutation: ${find} → ${replace}\n     Result: ${status}\n"
}

# CalculateDiscount boundary mutations
run_mutation 1 ">= 1000 → > 1000 (off-by-one at 1000)" \
  "orderTotal >= 1000m" "orderTotal > 1000m"

run_mutation 2 ">= 500 → > 500 (off-by-one at 500)" \
  "orderTotal >= 500m" "orderTotal > 500m"

run_mutation 3 ">= 100 → > 100 (off-by-one at 100)" \
  "orderTotal >= 100m" "orderTotal > 100m"

# Discount rate mutations
run_mutation 4 "15% → 14% (wrong discount rate)" \
  "0.15m" "0.14m"

run_mutation 5 "10% → 11% (wrong discount rate)" \
  "0.10m" "0.11m"

run_mutation 6 "5% → 6% (wrong discount rate)" \
  "0.05m" "0.06m"

# Negative check mutation
run_mutation 7 "< 0 → <= 0 (zero no longer valid)" \
  "orderTotal < 0" "orderTotal <= 0"

# CalculateShipping mutations
run_mutation 8 "> 250 → >= 250 (free shipping boundary)" \
  "orderTotal > 250m" "orderTotal >= 250m"

run_mutation 9 "> 250 → > 300 (raise free shipping threshold)" \
  "orderTotal > 250m" "orderTotal > 300m"

run_mutation 10 "> 10.0 → >= 10.0 (heavy item boundary)" \
  "weightKg > 10.0" "weightKg >= 10.0"

run_mutation 11 "> 10.0 → > 20.0 (raise heavy threshold)" \
  "weightKg > 10.0" "weightKg > 20.0"

run_mutation 12 "1.50m → 1.25m (wrong express surcharge)" \
  "1.50m" "1.25m"

run_mutation 13 "Remove express surcharge entirely" \
  "if (express)" "if (false)"

run_mutation 14 "15.00m heavy fee → 10.00m" \
  "baseCost += 15.00m" "baseCost += 10.00m"

run_mutation 15 "base cost 5.00 → 6.00" \
  "5.00m + " "6.00m + "

# ApplyCoupon mutations
run_mutation 16 "SAVE20 → 30% (wrong coupon rate)" \
  "0.20m" "0.30m"

run_mutation 17 "FLAT5 → 10.00 (wrong flat discount)" \
  '"FLAT5" => 5.00m' '"FLAT5" => 10.00m'

run_mutation 18 "Floor 1.00 → 0.00 (remove minimum)" \
  "result < 1.00m ? 1.00m : result" "result < 0.00m ? 0.00m : result"

run_mutation 19 "Unknown coupon gives 5% instead of 0" \
  "_ => 0m" "_ => total * 0.05m"

run_mutation 20 "FLAT50 on small total bypasses floor" \
  "50.00m" "500.00m"

# Restore original
cp "${SRC}.bak" "$SRC"
rm "${SRC}.bak"

echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║           MUTATION TESTING RESULTS                   ║"
echo "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"
echo -e "$results"
echo "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"
printf "║  Killed: %d   Survived: %d   Errors: %d              ║\n" $killed $survived $errors
total=$((killed + survived))
if [ $total -gt 0 ]; then
  score=$((killed * 100 / total))
  printf "║  Mutation Score: %d%%                                ║\n" $score
fi
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
SCRIPT
chmod +x /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712/mutate.sh
bash /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712/mutate.sh 2>&1

cat > /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712/mutate.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
cd /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712
SRC="PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs"
cp "$SRC" "${SRC}.bak"

survived=0
killed=0
errors=0
results=""

run_mutation() {
  local id="$1" desc="$2" find="$3" replace="$4"
  cp "${SRC}.bak" "$SRC"
  # Apply mutation using perl for exact string match
  perl -pi -e "s/\Q$find\E/$replace/" "$SRC"
  
  output=$(dotnet test PricingEngine.Tests -v q --no-restore 2>&1)
  rc=$?
  
  if echo "$output" | grep -q "Failed:     0"; then
    status="SURVIVED ⚠️"
    ((survived++))
  elif echo "$output" | grep -q "Failed:"; then
    status="KILLED ✅"
    ((killed++))
  else
    status="BUILD ERROR"
    ((errors++))
  fi
  
  results="${results}\n  ${id}. ${desc}\n     Mutation: ${find} → ${replace}\n     Result: ${status}\n"
}

# CalculateDiscount boundary mutations
run_mutation 1 ">= 1000 → > 1000 (off-by-one at 1000)" \
  "orderTotal >= 1000m" "orderTotal > 1000m"

run_mutation 2 ">= 500 → > 500 (off-by-one at 500)" \
  "orderTotal >= 500m" "orderTotal > 500m"

run_mutation 3 ">= 100 → > 100 (off-by-one at 100)" \
  "orderTotal >= 100m" "orderTotal > 100m"

# Discount rate mutations
run_mutation 4 "15% → 14% (wrong discount rate)" \
  "0.15m" "0.14m"

run_mutation 5 "10% → 11% (wrong discount rate)" \
  "0.10m" "0.11m"

run_mutation 6 "5% → 6% (wrong discount rate)" \
  "0.05m" "0.06m"

# Negative check mutation
run_mutation 7 "< 0 → <= 0 (zero no longer valid)" \
  "orderTotal < 0" "orderTotal <= 0"

# CalculateShipping mutations
run_mutation 8 "> 250 → >= 250 (free shipping boundary)" \
  "orderTotal > 250m" "orderTotal >= 250m"

run_mutation 9 "> 250 → > 300 (raise free shipping threshold)" \
  "orderTotal > 250m" "orderTotal > 300m"

run_mutation 10 "> 10.0 → >= 10.0 (heavy item boundary)" \
  "weightKg > 10.0" "weightKg >= 10.0"

run_mutation 11 "> 10.0 → > 20.0 (raise heavy threshold)" \
  "weightKg > 10.0" "weightKg > 20.0"

run_mutation 12 "1.50m → 1.25m (wrong express surcharge)" \
  "1.50m" "1.25m"

run_mutation 13 "Remove express surcharge entirely" \
  "if (express)" "if (false)"

run_mutation 14 "15.00m heavy fee → 10.00m" \
  "baseCost += 15.00m" "baseCost += 10.00m"

run_mutation 15 "base cost 5.00 → 6.00" \
  "5.00m + " "6.00m + "

# ApplyCoupon mutations
run_mutation 16 "SAVE20 → 30% (wrong coupon rate)" \
  "0.20m" "0.30m"

run_mutation 17 "FLAT5 → 10.00 (wrong flat discount)" \
  '"FLAT5" => 5.00m' '"FLAT5" => 10.00m'

run_mutation 18 "Floor 1.00 → 0.00 (remove minimum)" \
  "result < 1.00m ? 1.00m : result" "result < 0.00m ? 0.00m : result"

run_mutation 19 "Unknown coupon gives 5% instead of 0" \
  "_ => 0m" "_ => total * 0.05m"

run_mutation 20 "FLAT50 on small total bypasses floor" \
  "50.00m" "500.00m"

# Restore original
cp "${SRC}.bak" "$SRC"
rm "${SRC}.bak"

echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║           MUTATION TESTING RESULTS                   ║"
echo "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"
echo -e "$results"
echo "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"
printf "║  Killed: %d   Survived: %d   Errors: %d              ║\n" $killed $survived $errors
total=$((killed + survived))
if [ $total -gt 0 ]; then
  score=$((killed * 100 / total))
  printf "║  Mutation Score: %d%%                                ║\n" $score
fi
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
SCRIPT
chmod +x /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712/mutate.sh
bash /tmp/sv-529f4415b8904fe798e25c43baab7712/mutate.sh 2>&1
